title: SoftBank sinks 11% as Asia tech rout tracks declines in the U.S.
summary: SoftBank Group experienced a significant 11% decline, leading a broader selloff in Asian technology stocks. The decline is driven by mounting concerns about rising artificial intelligence infrastructure costs. This reflects growing investor anxiety about the economic viability of AI investments across the region.
content: SoftBank Group plunged, leading a broad selloff in Asian technology stocks amid mounting concerns over the rising cost of artificial intelligence infrastructure.

zh.title: 软银暴跌11% 亚洲科技股跟随美国下滑
zh.summary: 软银集团下跌11%，引领亚洲科技股更广泛的抛售。此次下跌由人工智能基础设施成本上升引发的担忧推动。这反映了投资者对该地区人工智能投资经济可行性日益加深的忧虑。

title: S&P 500 futures are little changed as index heads for losing week: Live updates
summary: The S&P 500 and Nasdaq Composite are both tracking toward losses for the week, with futures showing minimal movement. The technology-heavy Nasdaq is particularly affected by the broader market decline. This signals investor concerns about market performance as the trading week concludes.
content: The technology-dominant Nasdaq Composite and broad S&P 500 index are both on pace to end the trading week in the red.

zh.title: 标普500期货基本持平 指数本周走向亏损：实时更新
zh.summary: 标普500和纳斯达克综合指数本周均呈下跌趋势，期货涨跌有限。科技股集中的纳斯达克受到更广泛市场下跌的特别影响。随着交易周收盘，这反映了投资者对市场表现的担忧。
